ddt:Target.Name: AJF_J81_M9R_Eu5_v3
ddt:Target.Description:
J81 M9R Euro5 AJF
Version Soft : 68-80 (Diag On Can) Vehicule : J81 M9R Euro5 AJF April 2010
Auteurs : Cho, Lee-Hyoung leehyoung.cho@renaultsamsungM.com

Item.Text: Low and reverse brake pressure switch
Lock-up and low and reverse brake linear solenoid
Low and reverse brake shift solenoid
CAN mean effective torque information invalid
CAN engine torque without GB request information invalid
No possible classification about the type of fault
Open circuit or Short circuit to ground
Open circuit or Short circuit to battery

Data.Name: Low and reverse brake pressure switch
Mean effective torque calculated by the Gearbox (%)
Data.Comment: Mean effective torque calculated by the Gearbox
Data.Mnemonic: Mean effective torque from the gearbox

Data.Name: Engine speed
Data.Comment: Engine speed received on the CAN from ECM

DataItem.Name: Mean effective torque calculated by the Gearbox (%)

Request.Name: All output solenoids control
Request.Comment: This request enables to control all solenoids at the same time, during 6 sec

Request.Name: Write date of last after-sales operation
Read date of last after-sales operation
